title: Induction Hob Pots and Pans Set - 13pcs Nonstick Cooking Pans Set, Black Granite Cookware Set with Lid, Non Stick Saucepan Set, Frying Pan Set, PFAS PTFE PFOA PFOS Free
features: Healthy Natural Nonstick - Natural granite nonstick coating, non-toxic, free of PFOA, PFOS, APEO, lead, cadmium and other toxic materials that can leach into food, safe for you, your family and the environment. smokeless, safe and healthy. Cooking with little oil for healthy diet.

Induction Compatible - Thick stainless steel pan bottom makes this cookware set suitable for all stovetops (not to go in the oven). Die-cast aluminum construction allows the pan to heat up quickly and evenly, keeping the heat consistent. No warping and durable.

Easy to Clean - Its slippery, nonstick surface and no rivets design make the egg pan easy to clean in seconds with a towel, soap and warm water. Dishwasher safe, but recommend hand washing to extend its lifespan.
13 Piece Cookware Set Includes - 24cm & 28cm frying pan set, 4.3L saute pan with lid, 24cm/4L stock pot with lid, 16cm & 18cm saucepan with lid, 3pcs multi-purpose utensils.

Stay-Cool Handle & Glass Lid - The anti-scald wood-grain Bakelite handle is ergonomically designed for comfort and ease of handling. The explosion-proof glass lid prevents splashing and ensures maximum visibility.
All skillets are made from recycled aluminum with healthy grainte nonstick material to reduce carbon dioxide emissions by 80%.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page A Better Nonstick Cookware Set Ultra Smooth & Nonstick The slick interior is ideal for fipping pancakes and eggs. Super Easy To Clean Granite -coated finish that is super easy to clean and any dirt will slip right off. It makes cooking and cleaning much simpler. Easily Dump Out This specially engineered saucepans features pour spout designed to handle both starchy noodle water and viscous liquids like milk. The lids on the saucepans invert nicely for tidy storage.
